# Praise Worthy

> Praise Worthy is a roofing contractor serving North Richland Hills, Fort Worth, and the Dallas-Fort Worth area in Texas.

## Business Summary

- Legal/brand name: Praise Worthy
- Alternate name: Praise Worthy Roofing
- Website: https://praiseworthyroofing.com
- Phone: 682-321-6387
- Email: info@praiseworthyroofing.com
- Google Maps profile: https://www.google.com/maps/place/Praise+Worthy/@32.8602567,-97.2664166,13z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x6e0d6965cacc9bd1:0xcd3fdb4223065dc3!8m2!3d32.8602635!4d-97.225217!16s%2Fg%2F11mdfpbzgb?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDMxMS4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D

## Services

- Free roof inspections
- Storm damage roof inspections
- Hail damage roof assessments
- Roof repair guidance
- Insurance claim support during roof damage assessments

## Service Area

- North Richland Hills, Texas
- Fort Worth, Texas
- Keller, Texas
- Hurst, Texas
- Bedford, Texas
- Arlington, Texas
- Frisco, Texas
- Carrollton, Texas
- Plano, Texas

## Homepage Summary

Praise Worthy helps homeowners identify roof damage after storms or hail events. The company offers free roof inspections, documents visible damage, explains next steps clearly, and serves homeowners across the DFW metroplex.
